nasb.text: Yours is the day, Yours also is the night; You have prepared the light and the sun.

esv.text: Yours is the day, yours also the night; you have established the heavenly lights and the sun.

cnv.text: 白晝是你的，黑夜也是你的， 月亮和太陽，都是你設立的。

ccb.text: 白昼和黑夜都属于你， 你设立了日月。

csbs.text: 白昼属你，黑夜也属你； 明亮的星体和太阳是你确立的。
